body.title: Inference: automate model version rotation on registry update
body.result: ModelVersionChecker compares OR created epoch vs registry created_at; injectable _fetch_fn; 7 tests; 64567988
body.description:
Gated on T-inference-models-versioned. Once versioned model entries exist, the versioning process itself should be automated: when OR or Ollama reports a model has been updated (via API model listing with version/date fields), or when a model's eval scores diverge significantly from stored baseline, the registry should auto-archive the old entry and update the facia. This closes the loop so capability history accumulates without manual intervention.

**Affected files:** devices/inference/models_registry.py, devices/inference/sources.py (model listing endpoint calls), possibly a Scraps recurring job
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; OOP-first; log every auto-version event at INFO
**Scope boundary:** In scope: detect model version change via API listing (OR /models endpoint has created_at or similar); auto-call update_model() on change detected. Out of scope: eval score drift detection (separate capability-graph concern), notification when model updated.
**Completion criteria:** (1) Scraps job or startup check compares OR model listing dates against registry; (2) mismatch triggers auto-archive + facia update; (3) event logged at INFO; (4) tests: mock OR listing with newer date → auto-version fires; same date → no-op
